ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation ended */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the simulation */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Initial size of the population in the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., repeated game, evolutionary game) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., competitive, cooperative) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which the round belongs */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round ended */,
  "total_agents" INTEGER /* Total number of agents in the round */,
  "round_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., initial, intermediate, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., cooperative, defecting, mixed) */,
  "payoff_function" TEXT /* Payoff function used by the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_strategies" (
  "agent_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent's strategy in a round */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy adopted by the agent */,
  "adopted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent adopted the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_strategies_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_strategies_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_strategies_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which the agent belongs */,
  "initial_seed" INTEGER /* Initial seed used to generate the agent */,
  "population_seed" INTEGER /* Population seed used to generate the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., human, AI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_results" (
  "round_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round result */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of agents adopting the strategy in the round */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of agents adopting the strategy in the round */,
  "average_payoff" REAL /* Average payoff of the strategy in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_results_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_configs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_simulations" (
  "user_simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-simulation relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation involved in the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., start, stop, update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_tags_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
